caption: Real, non-springy soldier motion. Soldier bodies no longer ease toward their formation slots on a damped spring; they now ARRIVE under bounded force -- each body accelerates toward its slot at the unit's own acceleration and decelerates to land there with ~zero velocity (classic arrive steering). Watch the contact line: a cavalry charge slams the infantry front rank, the melee knockback shoves those bodies back, and each one decelerates and returns to its slot under real force -- a knockback-and-recover with no spring rebound, no wobble, no oscillation. Determinism is preserved (pure function of positions/velocities/mass/delta, no RNG), but outcomes differ from pre-change replays -- expected for a physics change.
